channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Potholes not repaired and failed repairs within one week of last road works, 20th April
item.description:
Hewlett Road outside number 162a and 165. There were workmen and equipment here to repair potholes with paint around them one week ago, 13 April. One of these photos shows potholes that they didn't repair and the other shows a pothole that they did repair that re-opened almost immediately.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 159, Hewlett Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 20th April
item.description:
2 way stop and go 28 day carriage way pothole approx 700x400x50mm (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Road Markings problem, 20th April
item.description:
Road closure. 28 day please refresh give way markings markings x14 600x200 mm dots plus x7 600 100 dots plus x2 3 meters lines (Faded Road Markings)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous road, 20th April
item.description:
They allegedly fixed the potholes for their records. Road is still a shamble. Where is all our money going? Useless.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Hesters Way, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Erminster Drive, Hucclecote, 20th April
item.description:
The weeds along the gutters and at the end of the cul de sac badly need attention. Many thanks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erminster Drive, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Worst road in the country contender, 20th April
item.description:
There isnt even a road going westbound anymore. Take some hiking gear once you get there. Utterly disgraceful from the council.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Swindon Lane, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Give way sign is wrong way round, 20th April
item.description:
This junction (Gotherington lane/Mirabelle road) is dangerous enough without the give way sign pointing the wrong way for months on end. Please turn it back to the correct orientation to give road users half a chance of giving way correctly. Also, the marks painted all over the junction are making it even worse for drivers to see the white lines. What are the marks for and when will they be removed?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 60, Gotherington Lane, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is misaligned (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: The drain is blocked problem, 20th April
item.description:
Hello. The drain next to Cotswold Kebab on Grosvenor Street is blocked. I request that the necessary action be taken. Sincerely
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water still coming through road surface in Dog Lane adjacent to old golf course entrance., 20th April
item.description:
Whilst a gulley was recently cleared, this has simply diverted the water elsewhere. I believe that the major culvert running from Crickley Court to the Old School house, below the old Cirencester Road/Dog Lane is partially blocked. Water is coming up through the blacktop and will eventually lead to the failure of the road surface, thereby affecting entry into Dog Lane. The culvert needs to be surveyed by camera to ascertain the cause of the problem which has been evident since first reported in November 2025. Please contact me to discuss - John Fenton, Spring Orchard, Dog Lane GL3 4UF Tel NO 01452 863038
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dog Lane, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 20th April
item.description:
15MDB CWPH 1000 X 400 x 42mm MARKED AS NUMBER 4 (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet
